---
title: "test workflow"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# test workflow 

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
# U
N = 3
NU = 300
measurement_settings = [LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting(N) for _ in 1: NU];
```

```{julia}
# state
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
ψ = random_mps(site_indices, linkdims=2); # Quantum state of interest
```

```{julia}
# measure and get the data
NM = 10 # Number of shots per setting 
measurement_group = MeasurementGroup(ψ , measurement_settings, NM);
```

```{julia}
# create shadows
classical_shadows = get_factorized_shadows(measurement_group);
size(classical_shadows)
```

```{julia}
# definite the mechanical quantum
ops = ["I" for _ in 1:N] 
ops[1] = "Z"
O=MPO(site_indices,ops);
```

```{julia}
# calculate the expect value
estimate_val = get_expect_shadow(O, classical_shadows)
exact_val = inner(ψ',O,ψ)
```

```{julia}
reduced_group = reduce_to_subsystem(measurement_group, [1, 3]) 
dense_shadows = get_dense_shadows(reduced_group) 
estimate_val = get_expect_shadow(reduce_to_subsystem(O,[1,3]), dense_shadows)
```

```{julia}
estimate_val = get_expect_shadow(reduce_to_subsystem(O,[1,3]), classical_shadows) # error
```
